plugin.name: wayfire-startup-zoom
plugin._long: One-shot CRT-style zoom-from-center animation when Wayfire first starts. Scales every initial view from a small centered square up to its real position.

option.name: initial_scale
option._long: Starting scale of the views before they zoom up to 1.0. Lower values = views appear smaller and farther away.

option.name: grace_ms
option._long: If no view maps within this many milliseconds after the plugin loads, the animation is skipped. Prevents the plugin from sitting armed forever on an empty session.
